title: Junior Data Engineer
description:
We are seeking a Junior Data Engineer to join our team. As a Junior Data Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining large-scale data systems.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement data pipelines using Apache Spark and Kafka
- Develop and maintain ETL pipelines using Airflow and AWS
- Collaborate with data scientists to build and deploy data models
- Ensure data quality and integrity across all data systems
- Troubleshoot data pipeline issues and optimize performance
- Work with cross-functional teams to integrate data systems with business applications

Must-have skills:
- Python
- Apache Spark
- Kafka
- Airflow
- AWS
- ETL Pipelines
- Data Lakes
- SQL
- Data modeling

Nice to have:
- Azure
- Docker
- Kubernetes
- CI/CD
